==================
Anonymous Function
==================

#check fun x => x + 2

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (fun
      (identifier)
      (binary_expression
        (identifier)
        (number)))))

=============================
Anonymous Function via Lambda
=============================

#check λ x => x

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (fun
      (identifier)
      (identifier))))

==========================================
Anonymous Function With Destructuring Bind
==========================================

#check λ ⟨a⟩ v ⟨w, x, y⟩ z => a

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (fun
      (parameters
        (anonymous_constructor
          (identifier))
        name: (identifier)
        (anonymous_constructor
          (identifier)
          (identifier)
          (identifier))
        name: (identifier))
      (identifier))))

==============================
Anonymous Function Application
==============================

#eval (fun x => x + 2) 10

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      (parenthesized
        (fun
          (identifier)
          (binary_expression
            (identifier)
            (number))))
      (number))))

=================================================
Anonymous Function Match With Additional Argument
=================================================

#eval foo 0 fun
  | 0 => 0
  | n => 1
  37

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (number)
      arguments: (fun
        lhs: (number)
        (number)
        lhs: (identifier)
        (number))
      arguments: (number))))

==========================
Sugared Anonymous Function
==========================

#check (· + 2)
#eval twice (· + 2) 10

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (binary_expression
        (cdot)
        (number))))
  (hash_command
    (application
      (application
        (identifier)
        (parenthesized
          (binary_expression
            (cdot)
            (number))))
      (number))))

=================
Explicit Function
=================

#check @ident
#check @ident α
#check @ident Bool true
#check @foo.bar

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (explicit
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (application
      (explicit
        (identifier))
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (application
      (explicit
        (identifier))
      (identifier)
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (explicit
      (identifier))))

===============
Match Style Fun
===============

def matchFun := fun | 0 => true | _ => false

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (fun
      (match_arm
        patterns: (number)
        body: (true))
      (match_arm
        patterns: (hole)
        body: (false)))))

===========
Quantifiers
===========

#check ∀ x, ∃ y, x + y = x
#check ∃ (x y : Nat), ∀ w, w + x + y + z = x

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (quantifier
      binders: (identifier)
      body: (quantifier
        binders: (identifier)
        body: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (identifier)
            right: (identifier))
          right: (identifier)))))
  (hash_command
    (quantifier
      binders: (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier))
      body: (quantifier
        binders: (identifier)
        body: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (binary_expression
              left: (binary_expression
                left: (identifier)
                right: (identifier))
              right: (identifier))
            right: (identifier))
          right: (identifier))))))

===============
Type Ascription
===============

#check (2 : Nat)
#check (foo bar : Nat)
#check (foo bar : baz quux)

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (number)
      type: (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (identifier))
      type: (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (identifier))
      type: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (identifier)))))
